visual_description: A man in a blue denim jacket walks through a dimly lit office space, passing by shelves filled with files and other people working at desks. The scene then cuts to a high-angle shot of a sparsely furnished, dark room with a checkered floor, where three men are seated around a table. Two men in light-colored shirts sit on one side of the table, while a third man in a dark shirt sits opposite them, with a briefcase and papers on the table.
audio_description: A low, sustained, and ominous musical tone plays throughout the clip, creating a tense and suspenseful atmosphere.
